title: Syrian Lamb Wrap
description: A flavorful and aromatic lamb wrap inspired by Syrian cuisine, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the ground lamb and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the lamb mixture for 5 minutes.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the lamb mixture onto the pita bread and serving immediately.
Serve with additional olive oil, if desired.
